# What to Log

## Why logging matters

Logging is not oversight. Logging is memory.

If the agent does not log, it cannot compound.

## Required run log fields

```markdown
# Run: descriptive name

## Date
## Agent / model
## Objective
## Files read
## Sources used
## Assumptions
## Buyer state
## Tactic selected
## Output created
## Campaign artifacts
## Experiment artifacts
## Decisions made
## Unresolved questions
## Next action
```

## Required campaign log fields

```markdown
# Campaign: name

## Goal
## Channel
## Buyer state
## Audience
## Tactic
## Offer
## Proof path
## Copy variants
## Creative brief
## Landing page path
## UTM plan
## Metric plan
## Launch status
## Results
## Learning
```

## Required experiment log fields

```markdown
# Experiment: name

## Hypothesis
## Variants
## Traffic / budget
## Primary metric
## Secondary metrics
## Minimum runtime
## Stop rule
## Result
## Decision
## Learning memory update
```
